name: Community Services of Nevada
description_short: Community Services of Nevada is a free credit assistance provider based in Las Vegas, Nevada. Rated 4.8/5 with 63 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Community Services of Nevada is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Las Vegas, Nevada. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 63 reviews, Community Services of Nevada has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Las Vegas area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Community Services of Nevada specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Las Vegas offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Community Services of Nevada provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Las Vegas, Nevada area who are considering Community Services of Nevada should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
